name: system-info-dashboard
title: System Info Dashboard
description: Quick system information dashboard with battery, CPU, memory, storage, and more. Requires fastfetch to be installed on your system.
author: Mrslimek

commands.name: check
commands.title: System Info
commands.subtitle: View system information
commands.description: Display detailed system information including battery, CPU, memory, storage, and more

systemRequirements.description: This extension requires fastfetch to be installed on your system to gather system information.
